faqs.q: What sizes should I offer for kids wall art on Etsy?
faqs.a: The most popular sizes for children's room and nursery prints are 8x10, 11x14, and 16x20 (4:5 ratio), plus 8x12 and 12x18 (2:3 ratio) and A4/A3 for international buyers. Offering all ratios in one listing maximises reach.

faqs.q: What is the best size for a nursery wall art print?
faqs.a: 8x10 and 11x14 are the most common nursery print sizes in the US. For gallery walls, buyers often mix 5x7, 8x10, and 11x14 in the same display.

faqs.q: Should I include A4 and A3 for kids wall art?
faqs.a: Yes. International buyers — especially in Europe and Australia — almost always print on ISO paper sizes. Including A4 and A3 alongside inch-based sizes significantly increases your potential market.

faqs.q: What pixel dimensions do I need for a 16x20 kids print at 300 DPI?
faqs.a: A 16x20 inch print at 300 DPI requires a file that is 4,800 x 6,000 pixels. SnapToSize generates this automatically when you upload your artwork.

faqs.q: Can I sell kids wall art prints in square sizes on Etsy?
faqs.a: Square sizes (8x8, 10x10, 12x12) are less common for framed prints but popular for canvas. Most sellers prioritise 4:5 and 2:3 ratio files first, then add square if demand warrants it.

sections: What sizes work best for bathroom wall art on Etsy
Portrait vs landscape: what sells in bathroom spaces
Bathroom print size guide by ratio (2:3, 3:4, 4:5, ISO)
Common frame sizes for bathroom walls
Small bathroom vs large bathroom — sizing considerations
Pixel dimensions for bathroom prints at 300 DPI
How to offer all bathroom wall art sizes without manual resizing

faqs.q: What sizes sell best for bathroom wall art on Etsy?
faqs.a: For bathrooms, smaller prints tend to dominate: 5x7, 8x10, and 11x14 are the top sellers. Vertical (portrait) orientation suits narrow bathroom walls. A4 is the top international size.

faqs.q: Should bathroom wall art prints be portrait or landscape?
faqs.a: Portrait (vertical) prints are preferred for bathroom walls because most bathroom wall spaces are taller than wide. 2:3 ratio (e.g. 8x12, 12x18) and 4:5 ratio (e.g. 8x10, 16x20) are the best fits.

faqs.q: What pixel dimensions do I need for an 8x10 bathroom print at 300 DPI?
faqs.a: An 8x10 inch print at 300 DPI requires a file of 2,400 x 3,000 pixels. SnapToSize generates this and all other standard sizes automatically.

faqs.q: Do buyers want A4 prints for bathroom wall art?
faqs.a: Yes — A4 (210 x 297mm) is the most common international print size and slots perfectly into standard IKEA frames, making it extremely popular with European buyers of bathroom printables.

faqs.q: How many file sizes should I include in my bathroom wall art Etsy listing?
faqs.a: Offer at minimum: 5x7, 8x10, 11x14 (4:5 ratio), 8x12, 12x18 (2:3 ratio), and A4 (ISO). Covering all major ratios in one listing prevents lost sales from buyers who only have a specific frame size.
